creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #2)

I ran the test suite with Python 3.12 and Python 3.13 a few days ago and the results are identical with Python 3.11.

There are also currently no reports at the upstream repository that py-flex no longer works at all with newer Python versions, e.g. due to a previously deprecated feature that is now no longer available.

Therefore, py-flex can still be used for a while, even though there has not been a proper update for several years at the upstream repository.

Hence I'll add a corresponding DEPRECATED note, as you suggested, together with the next batch of commits and leave out the EXPIRATION_DATE for now.

Once I've committed this, shall we leave this bug open for a while for tracking purposes?
